channel.title: NHC Eastern North Pacific
channel.description: Active tropical cyclones in the Eastern North Pacific

item.title: Eastern North Pacific Tropical Weather Outlook
item.description:
000
ABPZ20 KNHC 160503
TWOEP

Tropical Weather Outlook
NWS National Hurricane Center Miami FL
1100 PM PDT Mon Jun 15 2026

For the eastern and central North Pacific east of 180 longitude:

Well East-Southeast of the Hawaiian Islands (EP93):
A broad area of low pressure located well east-southeast of the
Hawaiian Islands is producing disorganized showers and
thunderstorms. Some slight development of this system is still
possible over the next day while it moves northwestward at 5 to 10
mph. Thereafter, increasingly dry mid-level air is expected to limit
further development.
* Formation chance through 48 hours...low...20 percent.
* Formation chance through 7 days...low...20 percent.

$$
Forecaster Adams/Pasch
item.author: noaa-contact@example.com (NHC Webmaster)

item.title: There are no tropical cyclones at this time.
item.description: No tropical cyclones as of Tue, 16 Jun 2026 05:45:01 GMT
item.author: noaa-contact@example.com (NHC Webmaster)
